question: How do late submissions work?
final_answer:
Late submissions are penalized at 10%, 25%, and 50% of the earned score for submissions received within 24 hours, 25-48 hours, and more than 48 hours late, respectively. Submissions more than 7 days late are not accepted. A 15-minute grace period applies to all deadlines.
Sources: policy_late_work.md, policy_late_work.md, policy_late_work.md, policy_extensions.md, policy_academic_integrity.md
